name: Homemade Caesar Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl until evenly distributed.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container or foil-packed pouch.
3. Label with date and contents.
4. Store in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 3-4 months.
Makes about 3 tablespoons, or 1 package, of Caesar Salad Dressing Mix.
